title: ScrxpzzCpvpPack
description: black crystals black anchors black pearls darker obisidian and darker golden apples
body:
Heres what this  mod does
adds grey totems
black golden apples

darker obsidian

if u have any other suggestions please tell me also report any bugs and i will get it fixed
and yes  more versions are coming soon
